programme.title: Hudson & Rex

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A mummified body is discovered in Newfoundland´s tundra; Charlie and Rex set off in search of a community of survivalists who may be harboring a murderer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The near poisoning of a wealthy socialite throws the team into a perilous investigation that puts Charlie, Rex, and even Jesse in harms way.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A young woman is abducted from the very spot her friend was murdered two years earlier; Charlie and Rex race against time as they trail the suspects from the original investigation.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex is on trial after his DNA is discovered at the scene of the murder of Donovan's former police informant.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex investigate a fairytale-turned-nightmare when a princess performer suspiciously dies at a child´s birthday party.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are in grave danger as they find themselves captives of a kidnapper seeking vengeance.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: An arsonist begins terrorizing a neighborhood with car bombs; Charlie and Rex race to find the next target before the case goes up in smoke.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Based on the best-selling book, 16-year-old Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place in the Hunger Games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss and Peeta become targets of the Capitol after their victory in the Hunger Games sparks a rebellion.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: Katniss is rescued by rebels and brought to District 13 where she becomes The Mockingjay.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Thrill Seekers
programme.desc: When intrepid reporter Tom Merrick discovers that the same man appears in photographs of major disasters over a hundred-year period, he embarks on an incredible action-filled race against time to prevent a series of new disasters.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Wake in Fright
programme.desc: After finishing up the school term in a remote outback town, teacher John Grant (Gary Bond) looks forward to spending his holiday with his girlfriend in Sydney. But John gets waylaid in a mining town where a gambling spree leaves him completely broke. He quickly falls in with the hard-drinking locals, who constantly ply him with alcohol and force him to participate in a gruesome kangaroo hunt. Disgusted, John tries to hitchhike out of town and, when that fails, begins to contemplate suicide.

programme.title: Code Name Banshee
programme.desc: Caleb, a former government assassin in hiding, resurfaces when his protégé, the equally deadly killer known as Banshee, discovers a bounty has been placed on Caleb's head. Now, they must put the past behind them and join together one last time to fight off the secret CIA-backed killers who threaten to destroy them.

programme.title: FernGully: The Last Rainforest
programme.desc: The magical inhabitants of a rainforest fight to save their home, which is threatened by logging

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over their bodies and erasing their memories.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: A sniper on a mercenary assassination team kills the minister of mines of the Congo. Terrier's successful kill shot forces him into hiding. Returning to the Congo years later, he becomes the target of a hit squad himself.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: In this carefully crafted suspense thriller, a group of problem students at an exclusive Northeastern prep school band together to wage a desperate and deadly campaign against terrorists who lay siege to their school in an effort to free a Colombian drug lord from an American prison.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: In the midst of WWII a small group of art experts are commissioned by roosevelt as soldiers and sent to the european theater to protect historically important buildings and monuments, and to locate vast troves of priceless art looted by the nazis. Discovering art in castles and mines, they race against time as the nazis scramble to destroy everything they can.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: The rousing story of a poor squire's (Heath Ledger) quest to change his fate, win the heart of an exceedingly fair maiden (Sossamon) and rock his medieval world.

programme.title: Miss Sadie Thompson
programme.desc: A former prostitute inflames the passions of the Marines and a high-minded missionary at a remote South Pacific outpost.

programme.title: The Happy Time
programme.desc: An innocent, young boy and his philandering uncle both fall in love with a beautiful maid.

programme.title: Good Neighbor Sam
programme.desc: A wacky comedy about a happily married advertising agent who helps out his single neighbor by posing as her husband so she can inherit $15 million.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: A spoiled heiress falls in love with the cynical newspaperman she enlists to help her escape her domineering father

programme.title: Fast Vengeance
programme.desc: "Upon hearing of his brother's death, a man named Shen returns to his old stomping grounds to find the men responsible and take justice into his own hands. He learns that a biker named Cobra and his ferocious gang, The Midnight Squad, were the ones responsible ... but to get anywhere close to them, he must enter the dark, turbulent realm of underground motorcycle racing. Enlisting the aid of a drag racing champion-turned-mechanic, Shen must compete in the high-stakes races where he will have one chance to confront Cobra. But when Shen's plan is revealed, he must battle both on the streets and in the ring to obtain his final revenge. Featuring hip-hop legend DMX (Belly, Romeo Must Die), Fast Vengeance is a high-octane action thriller with style — and rubber — to burn."

programme.title: Before I Go To Sleep
programme.desc: A woman wakes up every day, remembering nothing as a result of a traumatic accident in her past. One day, new terrifying truths emerge that force her to question everyone around her.

programme.title: College
programme.desc: To reconcile with his girlfriend, a bookish college student tries to become an athlete.

programme.title: JCVD
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme gets involved in a bank robbery with hostages situation and reflects about his life during it.

programme.title: Animal Factory
programme.desc: A young man goes to prison and a tough, older convict takes him under his wing as a mentor.

programme.title: Black Water
programme.desc: A deep-cover operative imprisoned on a CIA submarine teams with a fellow prisoner for a fight to escape.

programme.title: Escape Plan

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
programme.desc: When one of his team members goes missing, Ray Breslin must return to the hell he once escaped from.

programme.title: Escape Plan: The Extractors

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883

programme.title: The Pirates
programme.desc: Pirates and bandits hunt a gray whale after it swallows a royal stamp.

programme.title: Hunt the Wicked
programme.desc: Detective Huang Mingjin faces off against criminal mastermind Wei Yunzhou in a city plagued by dark secrets. As police and criminals flood the streets, Huang must unravel the city's sinister core while engaging in a cat-and-mouse game with Wei.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: A street fighter in Northeast China decides to start a new life in Hong Kong's Kowloon Walled City, but he's implicated in fights and conspiracies among triad forces.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: One year after avenging his brother's murder, MMA champion Kurt Sloane finds himself imprisoned by a powerful gangster in Thailand. To win back his freedom, he must train for a fight against a 400-pound killer in an underground death match.

programme.title: My Father's Other Family
programme.desc: Shelby meets Rose, the half-sister she never knew she had.

programme.title: My Sister's Serial Killer Boyfriend
programme.desc: Maddie is a local reporter investigating a series of killings targeting women.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Author Cheryln Cadle divulges chilling never-before-heard details about Watts.

programme.title: My Family's Killer Affairs
programme.desc: Nikki is shocked to meet Jenell, the daughter she never knew.

programme.title: My Father's Other Family
programme.desc: Shelby meets Rose, the half-sister she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A murder investigation in a small town focuses on Wendy Sinclair, who runs a shelter for the victims' wives.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: Street Crimes Unit
programme.desc: Detective Mills and Detective Smith are assigned to the Street Crimes Unit of the Police Department. While on a stakeout one day, Mills and Smith see a local politician, Alex Johnstone, arguing with his mistress. Days later the mistress goes missing. Mills decides to investigate Alex Johnstone, even after being told by his supervisor not to do so. Mills convinces Smith that they must find the evidence that connects Alex Johnstone to the missing woman before he tracks them down.

programme.title: Suffocated
programme.desc: Lexxy, a female trapped, and bonded to a man who she feels can possibly be her husband, and father to her child, takes her on a ride with lies, deceit, and betrayal.

programme.title: Suffocated: Room to Breathe
programme.desc: Lexxy wants it all: money, love, kids, a home. She has got the drive, now all she needs is the path. After a stint as a party promoter and criminal, she turns to the music business. Lexxy forms a female hip hop group, with dreams of breaking into the industry. Things look promising until lies and betrayal break up the group, and dissolve all friendships.

programme.title: Redemption For Easter
programme.desc: The Wright family decides to come together for the Easter holiday weekend after suffering during a tragic event; however, past turmoil, individual trauma, dark family secrets, and a sudden surprise announcement will potentially change everything for them as a whole, but it could also destroy their family unit forever.

programme.title: Saved By Grace
programme.desc: After being fired from her job, Grace Hightower applies for a position to work at the local church. Full of insecurity and self-doubt, her faith is tested when the church unexpectedly goes into foreclosure, forcing herself to find the courage to save it.

programme.title: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A couple plans a weekend at a mountain resort and are stalked by the man's evil twin.

programme.title: Mega Piranha
programme.desc: A mutant strain of giant ferocious piranha escape from the Amazon and eat their way toward Florida.

programme.title: Moon Crash
programme.desc: A drilling accident causes a giant piece of the moon to break off. Now it’s on a collision course with Earth.

programme.title: Dragon Crusaders
programme.desc: Fugitive Knights Templar are cursed. They must defeat the wizard-dragon to break the spell and save the world.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: The team responds to the threat of a potentially devastating earthquake in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Airliner Sky Battle
programme.desc: Russians hijack a commercial jet to crash it into a nuclear plant. Passengers and crew aboard must stop them.

programme.title: The Funhouse Massacre (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Six of the world's scariest psychopaths escape from a local Asylum and proceed to unleash terror on the unsuspecting crowd of a Halloween Funhouse whose themed mazes are inspired by their various reigns of terror.

programme.title: Possum
programme.desc: A disgraced childrens puppeteer must confront his sinister stepfather and a hideous puppet he keeps hidden in a brown leather bag in order to escape the dark horrors of his past.

programme.title: BODY BAGS (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Body Bags is an anthology horror film made up of three stories bookended by a creepy morgue assistant played by John Carpenter himself. The first story, The Gas Station, features Robert Carradine as a serial killer, with cameos by Sam Raimi and Wes Craven. Hair follows Stacy Keach as he receives a botched hair transplant that infests him with an alien parasite, and Eye is another transplant story, this time featuring Mark Hamill as a baseball player who loses an eye in a car accident and receives a transplant, only to be overtaken with the personality of the eye's previous owner: a murderous misogynist.

programme.title: The Funhouse Massacre (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Six of the world's scariest psychopaths escape from a local Asylum and proceed to unleash terror on the unsuspecting crowd of a Halloween Funhouse whose themed mazes are inspired by their various reigns of terror.

programme.title: Possum
programme.desc: A disgraced childrens puppeteer must confront his sinister stepfather and a hideous puppet he keeps hidden in a brown leather bag in order to escape the dark horrors of his past.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Cassie is being chased by a monster, and endangers a kind stranger when she asks for help- but what can they do? Then, a celebrated photographer is tormented after an award-winning photograph has more consequences than just fame.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A horror novelist's agent offers him help overcoming his writer's block, and the struggling author can't resist. Then, Richard's wife is attacked and becomes a shell of the woman he loved. He'll do anything to help her feel better.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Lyle is a disappointment, and when his parents meddle in his life and their plan backfires, he must deal with the aftermath. Then, Marcia takes her stepdaughter to her grandmother's house to claim their inheritance, and nothing can stand in her way.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: The Belaskos get more than they bargained for when they move in next door to a vampire-hating suburbanite. Then, a father and son bond by playing an old video game, but soon find out there's a reason it was abandoned.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A young couple are gifted everything they could ever wish for... but there's a catch. Then, an aspiring comic artist keeps hitting roadblocks. As she doodles away her frustrations, she realizes she might have more power than she thinks.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A struggling bookstore owner finds unpublished works of George Romero, but the comics lead to new troubles. Then, Shelby's mom struggles to accept that her baby is growing up, but hanging on to childhood relics isn't as harmless as she thinks.

programme.title: A Creepshow Animated Special
programme.desc: A surgeon crash-lands on a desert island ... how strong is his will to survive? Then, a teenager's family vacation becomes even more torturous when they pull off the road to see a sinister circus.

programme.title: A Creepshow Holiday Special
programme.desc: Robert Weston has reason to believe he might be a werewolf, but when he goes to a Shapeshifters Anonymous support group, he learns there's something far more sinister than his curse to worry about.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: After the death of a loved one, a drinking habit becomes insatiable. Then, dolls are Evie's favorite companions, but when a severed toy head appears in her dollhouse, Evie can no longer protect them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: Captain Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After Harry T. Collier, a beloved commissioner of Indian Affairs, is murdered in late March during the1880s, Captain Apache, an Indian graduate of West Point, is assigned by the army to investigate the crime. Suspecting that O.J., the sheriff of a town bordering the reservation may be involved in the killing, Apache travels there and finds the sheriff dining with his mistress Maude at the Paradise Saloon. Before Apache can question him, however, O.J. abruptly departs and rides out of town with Apache in pursuit. When Apache apprehends him, O.J. swears that he did not kill Collier and relates that the agents dying words were April Morning. Meanwhile, Griffin, a wealthy landowner and six of his henchmen deliver guns across the border to a corrupt Mexican general who is bent on overtaking the province by force. When Griffin then demands that the general now fulfill his part of the bargain, the general orders him killed, unaware that his lieutenant, Sanchez is in Griffins employ. Rather than killing Griffin, Sanchez shoots the general, and after promoting himself to the post, promises Griffin that he will cross the border in time for April Morning. When O.J. is found murdered, Apache questions Maude, who reveals that O.J. traveled to a Mexican cantina monthly. Apache then rides to the cantina, where he is met by a cavalry patrol led by Sgt. ORourke. Upon learning that the cantina owner has recently been killed, Apache demands that the mans widow, Rosita, take him to Rodriguez, her husbands employer. Rosita then introduces Apache to a Mexican sergeant who allegedly knows where Rodriguez can be found. Unaware that the sergeant is Rodriguez disguised as a soldier, Apache follows him to a church where the priest claims that Rodriguez has claimed sanctuary and is therefore immune to the law.

programme.title: Northwest Trail
programme.desc: Mountie Matt OBrien assignment is simple: He is to escort the rather grouchy, and slightly annoying, Miss Katherine Owens to a remote outpost. Things complicate however when they arrive at the outpost and he stumbles upon an illegal mining operation. Stars include Bob Steele, Joan Woodbury, and Poodles Hanneford.

programme.title: Over the Hill Gang

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Roy Rogers goes to jail after hes wrongly accused of killing Gabby Hayes horse in this action packed yarn from Republic Pictures. All of the old jokes about cowboys kissing their horse may have started with this very movie, as it focuses on Roys loving relationship with Trigger, the greatest horse in all of Hollywood. The film also features Roys beloved Dale Evans, plus, adding some country swing to the musical numbers is Roys favorite backing band, the Sons of the Pioneers! Songs include Ole Faithful, Long, Long Ago and Livin Western Style.

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: What happens when Abraham Lincoln himself comes to New Mexico to discuss a treaty with Native American chief Acoma (Ted de Corsia)? Find out what happens in this fictional tale packed with action from 1951!

programme.title: BMW International Open Day 4 2025

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind The Counter With Dave Chang: The Spring Menu - An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a Springtime inspired menu for guests Maya Rudolph and Ron Funchess. Dishes include: pea and mint soup, truffled egg toast, crab cakes with warmed artichoke and ramp salad, and roast lamb chops with spätzle and braised morels.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - A Little Bit of Everything: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on "A Little Bit of Everything" menu for comedian Jay Pharoah and rapper Lil Jon. Dishes include: Tempura Rock Shimp with Salsa Seca, Everything Bagel-Spice Flatbread, and Boiled Chicken Two Ways.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Classic Comforts: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a "Classic Comfort Foods" menu for NBA legends Reggie Miller and Mark Jackson. Dishes include: Caesar salad, New England clam chowder, fettuccine alfredo, salmon with caper-butter sauce, a potato rösti, and a chocolate tart.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Fish on the Menu: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. In this episode, Dave is creating a "Fish on the Menu" theme for Emily in Paris stars Lily Collins and Ashley Park. Dishes include: Hwe (two ways), Uni & Chickpeas, an Ode to Noma's Langoustine, Roasted Flounder, Fish Soup with Rice and Pickles, and Flottante.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Ratatouille Tarte Tatin" - Chris Ying creates a beautiful ratatouille tarte Tatin, motivated by a combination of online influences, including an on-the-fly challenge from his buddy David Chang while they were making chicken pot pie together in a different video. Chris riffs on the popular trend zipping around social media to make tarte Tatin (typically a sweet pastry) while paying homage to recipe YouTuber extraordinaire, Andrew Rea (Binging with Babish), who's first mega-popular video was recreating the ratatouille from...Ratatouille.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Chris Ying's Family Curry Recipe with Twice-Fried Potatoes, Chicken, and Roux-Thickened Coconut Milk" - It's Chris Ying's favorite dish on earth. His last-request meal. It's his dad's curry: a version of Macanese (as in, from Macao) Chicken: a roux-thickened coconut curry full of twice-fried potatoes and fried chicken thighs, flavored with ginger and Shaoxing wine. It's Chris's comfort food, which is fitting, since he's feeling a little emotionally battered as he makes it for us. Will the curry do its magic and pick him up? Only one way to find out!

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Mango Pie with California Mangoes and Graham Cracker Crust" - Chris Ying finds himself with four really expensive, fancy mangoes, so he tries out a viral mango-pie recipe from Samin Nosrat and Hrishikesh Hirway.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: New York City firefighters turn up the heat in Emeril's kitchen.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Fish
programme.desc: Sole food and more. One of Julia’s most memorable meals was the Sole Meuniere she had on first arriving in Paris after WWII. With Jacques, she recreates this dish, as delightful as ever. The sole is followed by grilled halibut with herbed butter, and poached snapper with beautifully turned and sautéed cucumbers.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Turkey
programme.desc: This meal is the holiday favorite that is so good, Julia & Jacques recommend it for any day of the year. Roast Turkey with sausage and cornbread stuffing, gravy made the old-fashioned way, accompanied by creamed onions and a zesty Cranberry-Apple Chutney. The “not-quite” which has to be seen, is the inventive way the turkey is cut-up before cooking, roasted and re-assembled for serving.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Soup
programme.desc: Four classic soups made from scratch in Julia’s kitchen: aromatic steaming hot French Onion Soup; Vichyssoise, or chilled Leek and Potato soup, as well as an original variation on the theme using watercress; and a hearty Mediterranean fish stew with an authentic rouille. And, because no show about would be complete without Chicken soup, we are presented chicken & noodle and chicken & rice soups.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Eggs
programme.desc: Eggs: all sizes, all types from chicken to quail to ostrich… soft, scrambled, poached… from omelets to Frittatas to eggs Benedict…not to mention Julia and Jacques scrambling an ostrich egg as voluminous as a dozen and a half Grade A Large.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Pork
programme.desc: A classic of the American table--pork chops and applesauce, is the starting point for three J&J improvisations: aromatic grilled, stuffed pork chops with rosemary, served with a tomato, red onion and avocado salad; loin of pork with sautéed red cabbage and apples, and Pork Tenderloin Medallions with port wine and macerated prunes on a bed of orzo.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Creamy Desserts
programme.desc: Julia dons safety goggles and takes up a blowtorch for this hot dessert show. Delectable Creme Caramel and creme Brulé vie for attention with creamy Chocolate Pot de Creme and Profiteroles with Ice Cream and Mocha Anglaise. This show is deliciously and elegantly decadent.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Shellfish
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques share opinions, and know-how, on mussels…and, oysters, clams and shrimp. Jacques shucks, Julia sauces, and they turn out Mussels Mariniere, Billi Bi soup, and Moules Ravigots, along with a classic shrimp cocktail and mignonette sauce.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Roast Chicken
programme.desc: Perfectly roasted chicken says Julia, is a telltale of a really good cook. Here are three ways to perfectly roasted chicken. Whether whole rack-roasted or trussed and stuffed under the skin with a savory and shallot sauté, or butterflied and roasted with a delicate spice rub, each has a crispy golden brown skin and juicy meat that say “Hmmmm! Great chicken!”

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques demonstrate the art, and the adventure, of the Soufflé. Julia extends the classic cheese soufflé to super-height…and Jacques creates a light, fluffy, flavorful scallop and cheese soufflé in a large casserole. For dessert, a chocolate soufflé and cream roulade. Twinkies were never this good!

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Winter Vegetables
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques take the doldrums about of Winter Vegetables, and demonstrate how even vegetables cooked only in season can be a special treat. Braised Cabbage stuffed with a flavorful ground beef and rice filling, one way with onions, celery, garlic and caraway seeds, and another surrounded with tomato sauce.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Charcuterie
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques demonstrate recipes for sausage and paté that are right out of the French countryside. Made from scratch sausage and lentil salad, country paté (2 ways), and, for a finale, a grand truffle infused sausage wrapped in fresh baked brioche (recipe also demonstrated).

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Comfort Food
programme.desc: Poached chicken, chicken pot pie and rustic apple tart dessert. Julia and Jacques show how simple it is to poach a chicken with vegetables, mushrooms and a little white wine, and then take that poaching liquid and use it with the leftover poached chicken for a flaky crusted chicken pot pie. The same simple pastry Julia makes for the pot pie is perfect base for a rustic apple and dried fruit tart.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Roast of Veal and Leg of Lamb
programme.desc: First is a Roast of Veal with Wild Mushrooms, Braised Endive, onions and white wine—the aromas just fill the kitchen. Second is a delicious Leg of Lamb, hip bone removed, studded with garlic on a ragout of white beans and pancetta, onions, mushrooms and thyme. And, not only are you shown how to prepare these dishes, but Jacques then demonstrates, step-by-step, how to carve and serve them.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom learn the secrets behind the perfect traditional English roast dinner in London’s historic Borough Market, explore the best of the diverse food offerings in Brick Lane and pop in to see their friend, Sir Ian McKellen, in his pub in East London.

programme.desc: Dive into the polar abyss of Greenland's fjords, testing the limits of man's ability to survive beneath Arctic waters. This expedition explores of 800 miles of Greenland's coasts, 450 Arctic dives, and researching over 1,000 scientific hypotheses with guidance by the local Inuit population.

programme.title: Secrets of the National Parks
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the Southwest along famous Route 66 and the Grand Circle, an area concentrated with national parks. Discover how Monument Valley in Utah and Gallup in New Mexico became cinematic locations, jet-ski in Lake Powell, and explore the spirit of the Navajo in Canyon de Chelly.

programme.title: Secrets of the National Parks
programme.desc: Hawaii Volcanoes and Haleakala National Parks are two of the most extraordinary places on Earth. Here you can witness molten lava bubbling from the earth, catch a spectacular sunrise above the cloud-line, or take a dip into pools of paradise.

programme.title: Wild Life
programme.desc: When the Isthmus of Panama closed 4 million years ago, the two largest oceans of the planet were separated, and massive geological events created a unique place. Discover five incredibly diverse regions within Central America and the Caribbean.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: Award-winning landscape cinematographers Jeff, David, and Jon have a knack for discovering roads that are less traveled that lead to extraordinary locations. Join them as they ride along the Princes Highway in New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: In a remote part of Alaska's Aleutian Peninsula that is accessible only by floatplane, Becharof Rapids Camp sits on the banks of the world-famous Egegik River. Each summer, outdoor enthusiasts travel here for a one-of-a-kind experience.

programme.title: Under the Pole
programme.desc: Firmly beset in the grip of polar winter, an opportunity arises to study climate change above and beneath the ice sheet. Part scientific exploration, part shared existence with the Inuit, this human adventure reveals the never-before-seen depths of this fascinating world in the throes of upheaval.

programme.title: Lonely Planet: Best Parks Ever - America's National Parks

programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Geoorge explores Java at the heart of the Ring of Fire.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: “Angry Planet” is there as 3 storms make landfall as hurricanes in the US.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Hellfire Heroes
programme.desc: While the Chief is out of town, a house fire breaks out in a remote part of Slave Lake.

programme.title: Hellfire Heroes
programme.desc: Firefighters burn grass fields hoping to prevent a repeat of the 2011 wildfires that devastated the town.

programme.title: Hellfire Heroes
programme.desc: Firefighters race to rescue a trapped child; a truck loaded with flammable welding tanks burns out of control.

programme.title: Escape To Nature
programme.desc: Slow down and immerse yourself in nature with beautiful wildlife footage and sounds.

programme.title: SafariLIVE Catch Up

programme.desc: Africa’s Heartbeat — the Masai Mara in Kenya, LIVE each afternoon.

programme.title: SafariLIVE Sunset

programme.title: SafariLIVE Catch Up

programme.title: SafariLIVE Sunrise Repeat

programme.title: Qatar - Pearls in the Sand
programme.desc: Explore Qatar’s untamed wilderness, unique wildlife, and human innovations.

programme.title: Ireland's Wild Islands

programme.title: Extreme Snakes

programme.title: High Life in the Dead Mountains
